name: Lohilo Foods Ab (Publ)
summary: Lohilo Foods Ab (Publ) operates as a food company in Sweden. It offers ice creams and functional drinks, as well as protein bars, chewing gums, and chips under the Lohilo, Alvestaglass, J√É¬§rnaglass, H√É¬§agen-Dazs, Bubbies, and Nicks brands. The company was formerly known as Alvestaglass AB and changed its name to Lohilo Foods Ab (Publ) in November 2019. Lohilo Foods Ab (Publ) was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Vaxjo, Sweden.
